name_en: Top-tier Original【Exclusive Real Shot m82560 Blue】
name_cn:
Top-tier Original【Exclusive Real Shot m82560 Blue】
This pocket wallet is crafted from full-grain Taurillon leather, subtly embossed with LV letters and Monogram flowers. The exquisite structure includes an inner pocket, while the outer pocket is convenient for credit cards or transit cards.
Dimensions: 7.5 x 11.1 x 1 cm (Length x Height x Width)
